title: Lead Instructional Designer at IDP Education India

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IDP Education India
jsonLd.description:
Join the IDP Education India family as a Instructional Designer in Bhubaneswar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IDP Education India:
IDP Education India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDP Education India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
